title: [spec-compliance] CoAP resources.py rt= values and SOS/rollcall payloads differ from LCI/apps spec
description:
Reviewed last 20 commits (mostly bd auto-commits + 3e570cb2d python CoAP resources fix). 

Key issues in python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:
- StatusResource.rt = "lichen.status" but spec/11-lci.md:194 requires rt="status" (similar for neighbors, config, keystore vs /keys).
- SosResource uses PUT {"from": hex, "t": ts} but spec/12-apps.md:609 uses POST /sos with {"type":"sos", ...} payload for multicast emergency.
- RollcallResource hardcodes demo values not matching full spec §18.6.
- Undefined _MESSAGE_ID_MAX constant (used in MessagesResource).
- EdhocResource logic refactored in "fix" but still needs alignment with spec 8.8 / RFC9528 MUSTs.

Violates "code differs from spec", wrong rt constants, payload formats. MUST align resources with LCI discovery and app semantics.

See spec/11-lci.md:188-202, 12-apps.md:519-680.
close_reason: Aligned rt values, payloads, fixed constant, Edhoc bugs, updated tests and build_site; ruff clean
